creator: r.neese@gmail.com
text:
I updated from 6.1 to 6.2 rc1 which went fine. After the final reboot and
running all the proper scripts, I started to have issues with my Netgear
wg511t th based wireless card. It is filling my log with up and down status.
I also at random intervals lose the card and the network connection. This
only started after I upgraded to 6.2 rc1. I have checked the logs and it
never shows when I lose connection. so I cant show a log.  I can only
explain the issue.
